task: Implement Dynamic Skill Acquisition using Markdown SOPs
patterns_learned: Instead of generating isolated executable sandboxes, MidpointX handles dynamic skill acquisition by generating Markdown SOP files.
This utilizes the existing `pluginRegistry` which was updated to allow Upserts for new skills.

An Immutable Core Guard was placed in `FileSystemController` to prevent the agent from destroying core execution modules (`src/core`, `src/nodes`), throwing explicit errors to request manual bypass if a core edit is genuinely required.
corrections: Added a dedicated `VerificationNode` to LangGraph to test structural integrity of generated API skills before they are saved.
